data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of overtime calculations (time-and-a-half after 8 hours), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions overtime rates, yet there are no prior steps or evidence that demonstrate how the system calculates or applies these rates. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of overtime calculations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for overtime calculations
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the scheduling system correctly applies time-and-a-half rates after 8 hours.
